title: wyewye A4 Frame 3 Pack, 21x29.7 cm Wood Picture Frames with Stand, Tabletop or Wall Hanging, A4 White Frame with A5 Mount, Document Frame with Plexiglass Window, White
features: 【Perfect Size】The A4 (21 x 29.7 cm) wooden frame with mat is the perfect size for displaying A4 / A5 size prints, posters, artwork and photos. It's smaller than A3 frames, making it a versatile and popular size for displaying all kinds of artwork and photos

【Easy to Hang or Tabletop】The A4 frame comes equipped with nails, making it easy to hang the frame on any wall vertically or horizontally. Tiny nails help to reduce damage to your walls, so you can hang your frame with confidence. Of course, there is a stand on the back of the A4 photo frame, and you can put it on the table directly

【Premium Quality】Our wooden photo frames are made from high-quality wood, which is both eco-friendly and durable. Unlike metal or plastic frames, our wooden frames are built to last, providing a beautiful and long-lasting way to display your photos, prints, and artwork

【Anti-Breaking Plexiglass】Our A4 white frame comes with plexiglass, which is stronger and more durable than regular glass. The plexiglass is resistant to pressure and cracking, making it a safer option for displaying your photos and artwork

【Stylish design】Our A4 photo frames boast a sleek and modern design that complements any decor. Its clean lines and white finish make it a perfect choice for displaying artwork, photographs, posters, and more in any room of your home or office. Makes for a thoughtful gift for birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, and more
